customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, self-motivated lead. Dylan filled out the form with genuine intent and volunteered qualifying details unprompted. No skepticism or scam concern surfaced. Primary risk is a thin bill anchor and an incomplete button-up, not customer resistance.
unresolved_concerns: Actual electric-only bill figure is unknown. Dylan quoted a combined utilities figure (sewer, water, electricity, gas) that Deepgram rendered as garbled on both utterances. Dylan also flagged that current consumption is artificially low due to travel — his normal usage is higher. Closer must confirm the actual electric bill directly before building the design.

Net metering / grid surplus interest: Dylan mentioned that his utility 'will actually find that I'll assist you that a surplus or at least store it on the grid for me' (01:31) — he has a specific expectation about how surplus production is handled by Los Alamos County Department of Public Utilities. Closer should be prepared to address net metering specifics for this utility.
sensitive_topics_raised: Dylan is on a 4/10 work schedule (Monday–Thursday) and has Fridays off. He explicitly declined Monday and stated Fridays work best. This is a hard scheduling constraint — do not attempt to reschedule to a weekday.
Dylan's current bill is artificially low due to recent travel. He proactively flagged this. The bill photo Bucky collected reflects depressed usage, not normal usage.
exact_promises_rep_made: Phone call appointment on Friday the 1st at 3pm (New Mexico / Mountain time confirmed).
Bucky will send a text reminder after the call.
Bucky stated the specialist will call Dylan (not show up in person) — framed as distance-based, not standard format.
closer_should_know: Dylan's bill figure is unreliable — Deepgram garbled both utterances and Dylan self-reported that current usage is abnormally low due to travel. Confirm the actual electric-only bill and normal-usage baseline before building the design. Dylan has a metal roof, a large south-facing orientation, and genuine forward-looking interest — he is a warm lead who will engage if the numbers are real. Do not reschedule; Friday-only availability is a hard constraint.
